        // public string FormattedPrice => $"{Price:F2}";
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<global::Foo.C, string>> FormattedPrice_Expression() 
        {
            var p__this = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::Foo.C), "@this");
            var expr_0 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Property(p__this, typeof(global::Foo.C).GetProperty("Price")); // Price
            var expr_1 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Constant("F2", typeof(string));
            var expr_2 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Call(expr_0, typeof(double).GetMethod("ToString", global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | global::System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance, null, new global::System.Type[] { typeof(string) }, null), expr_1);
